ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period during which the data was collected */,
  "inst_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institutional sector where the data was collected */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the descriptor */,
  "sna08trans_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the SNA08 transaction code */,
  "asset_liability_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset liability code */,
  "values" REAL /* Values associated with the dataset */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_period FOREIGN KEY ("period") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_inst_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_sector_id") REFERENCES inst_sectors ("inst_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES descriptors ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sna08trans_id FOREIGN KEY ("sna08trans_id") REFERENCES sna08transactions ("sna08trans_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_asset_liability_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_liability_id") REFERENCES asset_liability_codes ("asset_liability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inst_sectors" (
  "inst_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institutional sector */,
  "inst_sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the institutional sector */,
  "inst_sector_code" INTEGER /* Code for the institutional sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institutional sector */,
  "data_collection_methods" TEXT /* Methods of data collection specific to the sector */,
  "data_collection_frequencies" TEXT /* Frequencies of data collection specific to the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inst_sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor */,
  "descriptor_name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the descriptor */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sna08transactions" (
  "sna08trans_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SNA08 transaction code */,
  "sna08trans_code" TEXT /* SNA08 transaction code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SNA08 transaction code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the SNA08 transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sna08trans_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_liability_codes" (
  "asset_liability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset liability code */,
  "asset_liability_code" TEXT /* Asset liability code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset liability code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the asset liability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_liability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_date" TEXT /* Date of the period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_assets" (
  "financial_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial asset */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the descriptor */,
  "asset_liability_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset liability code */,
  "values" REAL /* Values associated with the financial asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial asset is denominated */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_assets_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES descriptors ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_assets_asset_liability_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_liability_id") REFERENCES asset_liability_codes ("asset_liability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_financial_assets" (
  "non_financial_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-financial asset */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the descriptor */,
  "asset_liability_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset liability code */,
  "values" REAL /* Values associated with the non-financial asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the non-financial asset is denominated */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the non-financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_financial_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_financial_assets_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES descriptors ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_financial_assets_asset_liability_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_liability_id") REFERENCES asset_liability_codes ("asset_liability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device or browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "default_permissions" TEXT /* Default permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_in_collaboration" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
